From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

American actor (born 1951)

| Lou Richards | |
| --- | --- |
| Born | (1951-09-03) September 3, 1951 (age 74)  [Perryton, Texas](/wiki/Perryton,_Texas "Perryton, Texas"), U.S. |
| Occupation | Actor |
| Years active | 1975–present |

**Lou Richards** (born September 3, 1951) is an American actor.

Richards is best known for his appearances on various [sitcoms](/wiki/Sitcoms "Sitcoms"). He played Clark V. Uhley, Jr. in the short-lived *[All in the Family](/wiki/All_in_the_Family "All in the Family")* sitcom spin-off *[Gloria](/wiki/Gloria_(American_TV_series) "Gloria (American TV series)")*, as well as Deputy Dennis Putnam in *[She's the Sheriff](/wiki/She%27s_the_Sheriff "She's the Sheriff")*.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

Among his voice roles are [Leader-1](/wiki/Leader-1 "Leader-1") in *[Challenge of the GoBots](/wiki/Challenge_of_the_GoBots "Challenge of the GoBots")*, Galtar in *[Galtar and the Golden Lance](/wiki/Galtar_and_the_Golden_Lance "Galtar and the Golden Lance")*, and [Flash Gordon](/wiki/Flash_Gordon "Flash Gordon") in *[Defenders of the Earth](/wiki/Defenders_of_the_Earth "Defenders of the Earth")*.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
